title: I receive without bracing
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for removing the internal tightening that stops large amounts of money from landing with ease.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 27 of the MONEY program. Use when receiving money, good news, or a big payment still produces a body-level brace rather than a calm, open landing.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 27 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when anticipating a large inflow (a payment, a deal, a transfer) and the body responds with tightness or disbelief rather than ease.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 27 of the MONEY program. The word "bracing" names a specific physical pattern: shoulders up, jaw forward, breath held. The statement releases that pattern and replaces it with open receiving. Say it as a plain declarative.
I am ready to release the bracing, tightening response to receiving large amounts of money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the knowing that I receive without bracing. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind. Drop your shoulders as you say it.
Adapted from Day 27 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
